name: 白底/纯色底产品主图

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.lighting: soft diffused studio lighting, even illumination

overrides.background: gradient from dark to light, premium feel

category_tips.beauty: emphasize texture and glow, show formula details
category_tips.electronics: highlight metallic finish, screen details, port precision
category_tips.food: vibrant colors, fresh appearance, show texture
category_tips.fashion: show fabric texture, drape quality, stitching details
category_tips.home: show material quality, craftsmanship, lifestyle appeal
category_tips.jewelry: macro detail, sparkle and cut quality, luxurious lighting

examples: {product}, professional product photography on clean white background, soft diffused studio lighting, centered, 8K, commercial e-commerce photography, no shadows, no props
{product} on pure white seamless background, bright commercial studio lighting, centered, 3/4 profile, high resolution, TikTok Shop ready, {material_description}
